items.summary: Fix the admin panel so that after successful Internet Identity login and password authentication, the authenticated identity is correctly passed to the backend actor when fetching bookings and session registrations, eliminating the 'account may not have admin permissions' error.

Ensure the useQueries hooks for fetching bookings and registrations wait for the authenticated actor (not the anonymous actor) to be ready before executing the queries, and invalidate/refetch those queries when the actor transitions from anonymous to authenticated.
